Female: A photo of a female pedestrian.
AgeLess16: A photo of a pedestrian who is a child or teenager under 16 years old.
Age17-30: A photo of a young adult pedestrian between the ages of 17 and 30.
Age31-45: A photo of a middle-aged adult pedestrian between the ages of 31 and 45.
BodyFat: A photo of a pedestrian with a large or overweight body build.
BodyNormal: A photo of a pedestrian with a normal or average body build.
BodyThin: A photo of a pedestrian with a thin or slender body build.
Customer: A photo of a pedestrian acting as a customer, often carrying shopping items.
Clerk: A photo of a pedestrian dressed as a clerk or staff member in a professional setting.
hs-BaldHead: A photo of a pedestrian with a bald head or no hair.
hs-LongHair: A photo of a pedestrian with long hair.
hs-BlackHair: A photo of a pedestrian with black hair.
hs-Hat: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a hat or head covering.
hs-Glasses: A photo of a pedestrian wearing glasses or eyewear.
hs-Muffler: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a muffler or scarf around their neck.
ub-Shirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a collared shirt or button-down top.
ub-Sweater: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a sweater or knit pullover.
ub-Vest: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a vest or sleeveless upper garment.
ub-TShirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a T-shirt.
ub-Cotton: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a garment made of cotton fabric.
ub-Jacket: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a jacket or coat.
ub-SuitUp: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a formal suit or blazer.
ub-Tight: A photo of a pedestrian wearing tight-fitting upper body clothing.
ub-ShortSleeve: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a short-sleeved top.
lb-LongTrousers: A photo of a pedestrian wearing full-length trousers or pants.
lb-Skirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a skirt.
lb-ShortSkirt: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a short skirt.
lb-Dress: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a dress.
lb-Jeans: A photo of a pedestrian wearing denim jeans.
lb-TightTrousers: A photo of a pedestrian wearing tight-fitting trousers or leggings.
shoes-Leather: A photo of a pedestrian wearing leather shoes.
shoes-Sport: A photo of a pedestrian wearing athletic or sport sneakers.
shoes-Boots: A photo of a pedestrian wearing boots.
shoes-Cloth: A photo of a pedestrian wearing cloth or canvas shoes.
shoes-Casual: A photo of a pedestrian wearing casual everyday shoes.
attach-Backpack: A photo of a pedestrian wearing a backpack on their back.
attach-SingleShoulderBag: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a bag over a single shoulder.
attach-HandBag: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a handbag in their hand.
attach-Box: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a box or rectangular package.
attach-PlasticBag: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a plastic shopping bag.
attach-PaperBag: A photo of a pedestrian carrying a paper shopping bag.
attach-HandTrunk: A photo of a pedestrian pulling or carrying a suitcase or hand trunk luggage.
attach-Other: A photo of a pedestrian carrying an unspecified or miscellaneous object.
action-Calling: A photo of a pedestrian making a phone call with a device to their ear.
action-Talking: A photo of a pedestrian engaged in a conversation or talking.
action-Gathering: A photo of a pedestrian standing in a group or gathering with others.
action-Holding: A photo of a pedestrian holding an object in their hands.
action-Pusing: A photo of a pedestrian pushing an object like a cart or stroller.
action-Pulling: A photo of a pedestrian pulling an object or piece of luggage.
action-CarrybyArm: A photo of a pedestrian carrying an object tucked under their arm.
action-CarrybyHand: A photo of a pedestrian carrying an object in their hand.
